economic_notes: Fort A La Corne Ventures LP is a GBE with 99.99% ownership; cumulative loss of $2,733,005. Multiple land claims and treaty negotiations ongoing for three sectors. JSCN Medical Clinic LP guaranteed by the First Nation. Member of Prince Albert Grand Council (PAGC).
notes: Consolidated entity includes James Smith Cree Nation Operations and CMHC Housing; governed by three sectors (James Smith Cree Nation, Chakastaypasin Band of the Cree Nation, Peter Chapman Band). Fort A La Corne Ventures LP is accounted for under modified equity method with cumulative loss of $2,733,005 shown as liability. Large unfunded loan guarantees exist: Government of Canada Native Claims loans ($3,834,242), RBC loans ($8,320,941), and BMO loans to JSCN Medical Clinic LP (amounts partially disclosed). OSR is negative because GBE losses and deferral of unexpended funding reduce revenue below government transfer amounts. Expenses by object show COVID-19 expenses of $835,115 in 2022 vs $3,460,956 in 2021. No schedule of remuneration included in the provided text.
